hero_desc: A unified platform for budget control, lunch distribution tracking, and transparent analytics. Works standalone or integrated with 1C:ZUP.
clients_desc: We have been working with some Fortune clients
community_desc: From transparent limit tracking to automated accounting reports, E-talon connects employees, the kitchen, and management into a single, efficient process.
card_desc-1: Automate meals for hundreds of employees. Eliminate voucher abuse and optimize cafeteria budgets with precise digital accounting.
card_desc-2: A modern service for your team: from pre-ordering menus via Telegram to instant automatic reports for HR and accounting.
card_desc-3: Manage meal accounting at remote sites in just one day. Minimal equipment — maximum expense control, even in the field.
card_desc-4: Full meal control without complex implementations or expensive software. Start working immediately — simple, affordable, and efficient.
card_desc-5: A tool to scale your business. Give your clients more than just food — offer them a transparent digital accounting service.
card_desc-6: A unified digital environment for managing branches. Transparent analytics, strict limit control, and full real-time reporting.
unlock_title_1: Automation of Meal Accounting and Control
unlock_p_1: The system automatically imports employee data from 1C:ZUP — including full name, position, employee ID number, branch, and coupon limits. Each employee is identified by their ID card, ensuring accurate tracking of issued and used coupons and monitoring monthly limits in real time.
unlock_p_2: E-talon generates summary reports and analytics by branches, departments, and employee categories. The interface is divided by roles: the HR department, accounting, and operators have access only to their areas of responsibility, which increases the security and manageability of the system.
ach_desc: We reached here with our hard work and dedication
